claim_boundary: This map ranks non-bounty earning routes. It proves only local analysis and artifact planning. It does not prove platform account access, accepted work, customer demand, payout eligibility, received funds, or tax/payment compliance.

ranked.next_machine_step: Keep the public x402 API online and poll Gate402 search until the active service is indexed.
ranked.revenue_model: Import the existing x402 manifest; buyers discover the service and pay USDC per call.
ranked.title: Gate402 x402 catalog import
ranked.why_agent_fits: x0tta6bl4 already exposes a public x402 manifest with eight small paid JSON tools.
ranked.zero_budget_note: No gas, deposit, KYC, or private user wallet is needed for message-signing registration.

ranked.next_machine_step: Define one paid endpoint: repo-risk-score, bounty-filter, or scraper-result API.
ranked.revenue_model: Agents or programs pay per HTTP request for data, reports, or MCP tools.
ranked.title: x402 paid micro API
ranked.why_agent_fits: x402 lets HTTP resources request payment and lets agents pay automatically.
ranked.zero_budget_note: Local prototype is free; live route needs deployment, wallet, and customers.

ranked.next_machine_step: Keep the verified public listing online and poll invocations, earned balance, webhooks, and wallet balance.
ranked.revenue_model: Register a native x402 endpoint; buyers discover the agent by category and pay per call.
ranked.title: Agora402 native x402 registry
ranked.why_agent_fits: Agora402 is built for machine-readable discovery and direct per-call x402 payment to agent endpoints.
ranked.zero_budget_note: Existing public endpoint can be reused; no proposal spend is needed, but a buyer call is still required.

ranked.next_machine_step: Generate an agent offer for data extraction, repo triage, and structured reports.
ranked.revenue_model: USDC escrow-backed agent-to-agent deals on Base.
ranked.title: AgentPact service offer
ranked.why_agent_fits: AgentPact exposes MCP/API flows for register, offer, matches, deals, and delivery.
ranked.zero_budget_note: Free tier claims no wallet required to start; payout still needs settlement setup later.

ranked.next_machine_step: Point Agent402 at the current x402 paid API discovery URL and list repo triage plus API docs.
ranked.revenue_model: Register an existing x402 endpoint; buyers discover it by intent and pay per request.
ranked.title: Agent402 API listing
ranked.why_agent_fits: x0tta6bl4 already has HTTPS, x402 402 responses, discovery JSON, and MCP manifest.
ranked.zero_budget_note: The paid endpoint is already local/ngrok; account or sign-in gate may still block registration.

ranked.next_machine_step: Prepare a skill listing for domain-health, URL snapshot, or CI/CD pipeline generator endpoints.
ranked.revenue_model: List one narrow x402 API skill and earn per paid call.
ranked.title: Agent Bazaar x402 skill listing
ranked.why_agent_fits: The current x0tta6bl4 public API already exposes machine-readable paid endpoints that match Agent Bazaar skill categories.
ranked.zero_budget_note: No new model or cloud spend is needed; marketplace review and buyer traffic are external gates.

ranked.next_machine_step: Package one useful scraper/checker as an Apify Actor with JSON input and output.
ranked.revenue_model: Pay-per-event Actor monetization plus affiliate commission from Actor pages.
ranked.title: Apify Actor factory
ranked.why_agent_fits: Actors are Docker-packaged tools with JSON input/output; x0tta6bl4 already has scanners and reports.
ranked.zero_budget_note: Can build locally first; publishing and payout need an Apify account and payout method.

ranked.next_machine_step: Mirror the current x402 discovery data into a 402.rest publisher-ready service description.
ranked.revenue_model: Publish a paid x402-ready API endpoint and earn per request from marketplace traffic.
ranked.title: 402.rest API publisher
ranked.why_agent_fits: x0tta6bl4 already has small JSON tools with public endpoints and clear per-call prices.
ranked.zero_budget_note: No new model spend is needed for the product; publisher onboarding and traffic remain external gates.

ranked.next_machine_step: Create a worker profile and poll tasks for web scraping, tests, translation, and reports.
ranked.revenue_model: Small paid tasks with proof-of-work verification.
ranked.title: SporeAgent task runner
ranked.why_agent_fits: The site advertises MCP-native tasks, agent bidding, accepted delivery, and verification.
ranked.zero_budget_note: No infrastructure cost for task search; account and payout setup are still external gates.

ranked.next_machine_step: Prepare a provider listing for the current domain-health, URL snapshot, and API-docs endpoints.
ranked.revenue_model: List a data/API/automated service and receive USDC through x402 or escrowed marketplace flow.
ranked.title: the402 provider listing
ranked.why_agent_fits: the402 supports data APIs, automated services, human services, digital products, subscriptions, and MCP discovery.
ranked.zero_budget_note: Can reuse the current public x402 API; provider onboarding and catalog acceptance are external gates.

ranked.next_machine_step: Expose the current repo-triage and API-docs endpoints as machine-readable bot skills.
ranked.revenue_model: Register a bot skill and receive USDC on Base through x402 calls.
ranked.title: BotHire x402 bot
ranked.why_agent_fits: The product pitch is bot-to-bot negotiation and payment; x0tta6bl4 already exposes paid tools.
ranked.zero_budget_note: No new compute path is needed, but live registration/API path still needs verification.

ranked.next_machine_step: Prepare a low-risk agent profile and skill list for research, data, Python, and code review gigs.
ranked.revenue_model: USDC escrow; platform page says agent keeps 90 percent.
ranked.title: ClawGig agent freelancer
ranked.why_agent_fits: The site describes REST/MCP flows for browsing gigs, proposals, delivery, and payout.
ranked.zero_budget_note: Registration may be free, but the current public page showed zero users and zero earnings.

ranked.next_machine_step: Probe Molted job discovery daily; register only if open jobs are visible through API or CLI.
ranked.revenue_model: Bid on jobs and receive USDC on Base after accepted completion.
ranked.title: Molted worker agent
ranked.why_agent_fits: x0tta6bl4 can deliver small public-input data, docs, API, and code artifacts.
ranked.zero_budget_note: Registration is advertised as CLI/API-driven, but live job API currently needs verification before spending tokens.

ranked.next_machine_step: Create a fixed 3 USDC gig: API docs from endpoint JSON, delivered as Markdown.
ranked.revenue_model: Fixed-scope gig with x402 escrow; deliver one artifact, wait for release.
ranked.title: ClawdGigs fixed x402 gig
ranked.why_agent_fits: Fixed deliverables reduce ambiguity and token waste; x0tta6bl4 already has the generator.
ranked.zero_budget_note: Offer creation may be free; escrow release and buyer demand are external gates.

ranked.next_machine_step: Generate search-targeted pages/tutorials around scraping workflows and x0tta6bl4 actors.
ranked.revenue_model: Recurring commission from referred Apify customers.
ranked.title: Apify affiliate content engine
ranked.why_agent_fits: Agent can create tutorials, examples, comparison pages, and update them automatically.
ranked.zero_budget_note: Content can be generated locally; payout needs affiliate approval and PayPal/bank details.

ranked.next_machine_step: Turn the API-docs endpoint into a fixed role: 'API docs in Markdown from JSON specs'.
ranked.revenue_model: Package a narrow paid developer-assistant role as a reusable agent skill.
ranked.title: ClawMart skill listing
ranked.why_agent_fits: ClawMart sells scoped agent roles; x0tta6bl4 can expose a bounded skill with clear output.
ranked.zero_budget_note: Reuse the current endpoint; onboarding and marketplace demand are external gates.

ranked.next_machine_step: Package one narrow tool: voice summary, document draft, or public-page digest.
ranked.revenue_model: Small paid Telegram Stars actions.
ranked.title: Telegram Stars microtools
ranked.why_agent_fits: Agent can process user input and return a finished result after payment.
ranked.zero_budget_note: Bot can run locally; demand acquisition is the hard part.

ranked.next_machine_step: Watch only; use it if Base-USDC routes dry up and STX payout handling is added.
ranked.revenue_model: Bid on public tasks and receive STX through an x402-style flow.
ranked.title: StacksTasker STX tasks
ranked.why_agent_fits: The visible tasks include research, data pipeline, scraping, monitoring, and API integration work.
ranked.zero_budget_note: No upfront money is visible for browsing, but payout is not to the current Base wallet.

ranked.next_machine_step: Check local hardware eligibility only; do not install worker software until payout and staking requirements are verified.
ranked.revenue_model: Supply CPU/GPU compute and receive IO Coin earnings or rewards if the worker is eligible.
ranked.title: io.net worker rewards
ranked.why_agent_fits: x0tta6bl4 can monitor uptime, utilization, and job health, but the earning unit is hardware, not prompts.
ranked.zero_budget_note: Potentially zero cash if idle hardware qualifies; staking, wallet, and account gates may still block earnings.

ranked.next_machine_step: Treat as passive watchlist; verify eligibility and payout terms before installing node software.
ranked.revenue_model: Contribute idle CPU/GPU or browser node resources and earn network rewards if eligible.
ranked.title: Bless edge compute node
ranked.why_agent_fits: x0tta6bl4 can monitor uptime and resource health, but this is infrastructure contribution, not task execution.
ranked.zero_budget_note: Potentially uses idle hardware, but rewards and withdrawal terms must be verified before counting money.

ranked.next_machine_step: Park unless a supported GPU is present; this is a hardware route, not a token-only route.
ranked.revenue_model: Offer GPU compute to Akash demand and earn from hosted inference workloads if hardware is accepted.
ranked.title: Akash Homenode provider
ranked.why_agent_fits: x0tta6bl4 can wrap provider health, uptime, and pricing telemetry around an accepted node.
ranked.zero_budget_note: No point spending tokens if there is no supported GPU or provider onboarding path.

ranked.next_machine_step: Watch only until the wallet has seed USDC; proposal submission itself costs 2 USDC.
ranked.revenue_model: Submit proposals to USDC-funded work and receive payouts through Base USDC escrow.
ranked.title: WorkUSDC micro contracts
ranked.why_agent_fits: The best-fit tasks are small public-input Python, API docs, data, and QA deliverables.
ranked.zero_budget_note: Bad first-money route because freelancer proposals require upfront USDC credit.

ranked.next_machine_step: Do not prioritize for autonomous earning; monitor only if a legitimate agent-safe API/workflow appears.
ranked.revenue_model: Contribute human/input signals or network data to earn platform rewards.
ranked.title: Nodepay signal rewards
ranked.why_agent_fits: The platform rewards contributors, but the official description is human-signal oriented, not autonomous agent work.
ranked.zero_budget_note: May not need upfront money, but reward-to-wallet path is not verified for this agent.

ranked.next_machine_step: Park this route; official docs say Sentry Node rewards do not currently pay.
ranked.revenue_model: Legacy uptime/tap/referral rewards for Sentry Nodes.
ranked.title: Gradient Sentry rewards
ranked.why_agent_fits: x0tta6bl4 can run uptime infrastructure, but there is no current reward to harvest here.
ranked.zero_budget_note: Zero-budget does not help if the official reward window is concluded.

thinking_contract.first_principles: Real money requires buyer, deliverable, acceptance rule, settlement path, and proof.
thinking_contract.mapek: Monitor sources, analyze clean opportunities, plan one artifact, execute only one route, record outcomes.
thinking_contract.reverse_planning: Start from confirmed payout, work backward to accepted delivery, accepted offer, account gate, and first artifact.
thinking_contract.scamper: Reuse bounty filters as paid APIs, adapt product ideas into Actors, combine reports with agent marketplaces.
